---
title: "第1章"
---

# 讲义

<img src="img/teacher.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[课程简介讲义](https://lizongzhang.github.io/business_stat/intro.html){target="_blank"}
        
        
<img src="img/teacher.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[Getting Started
        讲义](https://lizongzhang.github.io/business_stat/chapgs.html){target="_blank"}
        
<img src="img/teacher.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[chap1
        讲义](https://lizongzhang.github.io/business_stat/chap1.html){target="_blank"} 
        
# 本章难点

<details>

## GS: Descriptive Statistics & Inferential Statistics

<details>
<summary>Click to view image</summary>

<img src="img/branch4.jpg" style="width: 80%; display: block; margin: 15px auto;">
<img src="img/branch3.png" style="width: 80%; display: block; margin: 15px auto;">
<img src="img/branch1.png" style="width: 80%; display: block; margin: 15px auto;">
<img src="img/branch2.png" style="width: 80%; display: block; margin: 15px auto;">

</details>

## Classifying Variables by Type

<details>
<summary>Click to view image</summary>

<img src="img/var_type1.jpg" style="width: 80%; display: block; margin: 15px auto;">

</details>

## Population vs Sample

<details>
<summary>Click to view image</summary>

<img src="img/popu_sample1.jpg" style="width: 80%; display: block; margin: 15px auto;">

<img src="img/popu_sample2.jpg" style="width: 80%; display: block; margin: 15px auto;">

</details>

## Types of Sampling Methods

<details>
<summary>Click to view image</summary>

<img src="img/sampling1.jpg" style="width: 80%; display: block; margin: 15px auto;">

</details>

## Types of Survey Errors

<details>
<summary>Click to view image</summary>

<img src="img/survey_errors1.jpg" style="width: 80%; display: block; margin: 15px auto;">

</details>

</details>




# 课堂练习


## 题目1

### 1.1 浏览下述二手房信息，可以提取二手房的哪些变量？

<details>

<summary>点击浏览图片</summary>

- 房源1：五山花园

<img src="img/house_1.png" style="width: 80%; display: block; margin: 15px auto;">

- 房源2：华农嵩山
<img src="img/house_2.png" style="width: 80%; display: block; margin: 15px auto;">


- 房源3：汇景新城
<img src="img/house_3.png" style="width: 80%; display: block; margin: 15px auto;">

### 1.2 从该网页中提取的变量是分类数据(有序分类还是无序分类), 还是数值数据(离散数据还是连续数据)？

### 1.3 根据上述二手房房源信息，你感兴趣的问题是什么？

## 题目2

### 2.1 开展关于毕业生薪酬的研究，你感兴趣那些问题？列出研究问题。

### 2.2 针对你想研究的的问题，你想收集那些数据？列出变量名称，这些数据是分类数据(有序分类还是无序分类), 还是数值数据(离散数据还是连续数据)？


# 软件工具

<img src="img/video.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px;">[如何加载Excel的“数据分析”加载项](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV19S4y1r7E4/){target="_blank"}

<img src="img/video.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[不用安装就可以免费使用的网页版Excel](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1w6421w7Rf/){target="_blank"}

<img src="img/video.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[如何将WORD文档转成图片？](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1GU4y1f7f9/){target="_blank"}



# 拓展资源

<img src="img/link.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">经管之家 <https://bbs.pinggu.org/>{target="_blank"} 

<img src="img/link.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">狗熊会(微信公众号) <https://www.xiong99.com.cn/>{target="_blank"}

<img src="img/link.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">UCLA Data Analysis Examples <https://stats.oarc.ucla.edu/other/dae/>{target="_blank"} 

<img src="img/link.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">Learn Excel with Examples <https://www.excel-easy.com/examples.html>{target="_blank"} 

<img src="img/link.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">The Data And Story Library <https://dasl.datadescription.com/>{target="_blank"} 

<img src="img/link.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px"> Kaggle <https://www.kaggle.com/>{target="_blank"} 

<img src="img/link.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">CSMAR 国泰安经济金融数据库  <http://www.gtarsc.com/Home>
        
<img src="img/link.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">中国家庭追踪调查 CFPS <http://www.isss.pku.edu.cn/cfps/>
    
<img src="img/link.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">中国家庭金融调查数据 CHFS  <https://chfs.swufe.edu.cn>
    
<img src="img/link.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">中国健康与养老数据追踪调查数据CHARLS <http://charls.pku.edu.cn>
    
<img src="img/link.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">暨南大学社会调查中心  <https://sdc-iesr.jnu.edu.cn>
    
# 教学视频

<img src="img/video.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[如何从中国知网下载统计数据？](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV19m4y1F7FE/)

<img src="img/video.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[八爪鱼客户端抓取网页数据？](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV18u411D7GM/)

<img src="img/video.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[如何用Excel整理提取的网页数据？](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1HL411N7BG/)



# 课堂小调查

**电子产品消费调查：<https://v.wjx.cn/vm/rMN4ASP.aspx#>**


# 测验

- <img src="img/link.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px;">[Quiz: GETTING STARTED: IMPORTANT THINGS TO LEARN FIRST](https://ks.wjx.com/vm/hA8GRBD.aspx# ){target="_blank"}
